text.title: Audience to Paid Conversion Loop Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the audience ≥200 subs OR ≥1000 monthly visitors?

branch.question: Does the proposed variant change exactly one variable?

text.example: Newsletter with 1.2k subs, one-variable subject test → freeze window, ship variant, wait, decide.
